summaryAm: ችግኝን በብልሃት መፍታት የሚያሳይ አጭር ታሪክ።
moralAm: በትንሽ ትንሽ ሀሳብ ትልቅ ችግኝ ይፈታል።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: የቁራው እና የውሃ ማሰሮው ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Crow and the Pitcher story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A curious crow finds a pitcher with a little water inside.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ ብልሃትን እና ሙከራን ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the clever problem-solving moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The crow drops small pebbles into the pitcher one by one.

pages.textEn: The story will end with joy and a solution.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The crow happily drinks water after solving the problem.
